faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Flatbush homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies in Flatbush are typically caused by organic buildup in drains, pipes, and sewer lines. Older buildings common in Flatbush often have aging plumbing where bacteria, sewage, and organic matter accumulate, creating ideal breeding grounds. Leaky pipes, backed-up drains, and moisture issues also contribute to infestations.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Flatbush?

Our technicians thoroughly inspect all drains, apply professional-grade treatments, and provide prevention recommendations. Follow-up visits may be scheduled if needed to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Is drain fly treatment safe for my Flatbush apartment building?
